footerText: Paw Print - Your pet's unique digital imprint to find them faster.
openSourceFooter: Proudly Open Source. Join our community on GitHub!
vetRegisteredAlert: Thank you! {{clinicName}} has been registered as a partner clinic.
homeSubtitle: The fastest way to reunite with your lost pet. Create a secure digital passport today.
ecosystemDesc: Paw Print connects owners, finders, and vets in a seamless network. Choose your role to see how we empower you.
roleOwnerStep1Desc: Build a comprehensive biometric profile with photos, marks, and medical data.
roleOwnerStep2Desc: Instantly notify the community and vets within a 5km radius if your pet goes missing.
roleOwnerStep3Desc: Verify ownership through AI matching and coordinate safe pickups via secure chat.
roleFinderStep1Desc: Found a stray? Take a photo. Our AI analyzes visual features to find a match.
roleFinderStep2Desc: Compare unique markings against our lost pet database in seconds.
roleFinderStep3Desc: Message the owner directly without revealing your phone number or address.
roleVetStep1Desc: Access digital health records and manage appointments for your furry patients.
roleVetStep2Desc: Use our AI Health Assistant to triage symptoms and draft care instructions.
roleVetStep3Desc: Become a registered safe haven for lost pets and grow your practice visibility.
forVetsDesc: Join our network of heroes. Help reunite lost pets with their families and promote your clinic to local pet owners.
openSourceDesc: Paw Print is an open-source project. We believe collaboration is the best way to help more animals.
createImprontaDescription: This information creates a unique visual ID to help identify your pet if they get lost.
tagUniqueMarksDesc: Click on the photos to add markers for unique features.
liveAssistantWelcomeDesc: I'm here to help you identify a found pet or manage your profile.
missingPetsMapDesc: Recently reported lost pets in our community.
findVetDesc: Search for a vet by location.
supportUsDesc: Your support helps us keep the servers running.
serverGoalDesc: Help us keep the servers running for lost pets.
noAlertsArea: No active alerts in this area
tierCoffeeDesc: Offer a coffee to the team.
firebaseAuthError: Auth Error. Please ensure Anonymous Auth is enabled in Firebase Console.
supportViaBlockchain: Support Paw Print directly via Blockchain.
confirmDeletePet: Are you sure you want to delete this pet? This action cannot be undone.
adoptionCenterDescPublic: Browse pets available for adoption from our partner shelters.
noPetsForAdoption: No pets currently available for adoption.
loginToAdoptWarning: You must be logged in to inquire about adoption.
adoptionInquiryTemplate: Hello! I am very interested in adopting {{petName}}. Could you provide more information about the adoption process?
vetVerificationDesc: To access the Veterinarian Dashboard, we need to verify your professional license.
vetTermsHeader: Paw Print Veterinarian Terms of Service
vetTermsIntro: By registering as a Veterinarian on Paw Print, you agree to:
vetTermsItem1: Provide accurate and up-to-date medical information for pets linked to your clinic.
vetTermsItem2: Use the platform solely for professional purposes related to animal welfare.
vetTermsItem3: Maintain the confidentiality of pet owner data in compliance with GDPR and local privacy laws.
vetTermsItem4: Not use the platform for unauthorized advertising or spam.
vetTermsItem5: Acknowledge that your account status is subject to verification of your professional credentials.
acceptTermsLabel: I accept the Terms and Conditions and certify that I am a licensed veterinarian.
uploadOnePhotoWarning: Please upload at least one photo.
behaviorPlaceholder: e.g. Friendly with people but scared of thunder...
noPatientsYetDesc: Add your first patient to start managing their records and appointments digitally.
superAdminInitializedSuccess: Super Admin initialized successfully. Please log in.
invalidAdminCredentials: SECURITY ALERT: Invalid administrative credentials. Access denied.
invalidSecurityKey: SYSTEM ERROR: Invalid Private Security Key.
searchNamePrompt: Enter a name for this search:
devModeMarquee: DEV MODE: DEVELOPMENT IN PROGRESS • SVILUPPO IN CORSO • EN DESARROLLO • EN DÉVELOPPEMENT • ENTWICKLUNG LÄUFT • 正在开发中 • قيد التطوير • ÎN DEZVOLTARE •
loginToContactOwner: Please login to contact the owner.
